document.name: My Little Melbourne
document.shortDescription: Australian-style café off Kazinczy — flat whites, brunch, and filter coffee in the Jewish Quarter.
document.longDescription:
My Little Melbourne on Rumbach Sebestyén utca brings Aussie brunch culture a block from Kazinczy utca clubs. Expect avocado toast, quality espresso, and homemade cakes. Hours on mylittlemelbourne.hu.

Sources: https://mylittlemelbourne.hu/
